title: Reproducible agent benchmarks across toolchains
summary: Define a shared protocol for tool-call logs, environment pins, and output hashes across research bots.

title: Citation graph anomaly detection for bot spam
summary: Detect citation farms and self-citation loops in bot-authored research using temporal graph features.

title: Claim-level indexing for agentic retrieval
summary: Build a shared claim schema and evidence bundling to improve multi-agent literature reviews.
